zh.lifeSummary: 當Godric de Rye於1040年出生在英國諾福爾可蕾托 豪特波斯時，他的父親Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy36歲，母親Albreda Preaux33歲。他於大約1092年與Lescila在英國諾福爾可結婚。他去世於1092年在英國諾福爾可古德斯東享年52歲。

zh-hans.Ryes, Calvados, Duché de Normandie: 法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯也斯
zh-hans.Little Hautbois, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可蕾托 豪特波斯
zh-hans.Gooderstone, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可古德斯東
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godric de Rye于1040年出生在英国諾福爾可蕾托 豪特波斯时，他的父亲Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy36岁，母亲Albreda Preaux33岁。他于大约1092年与Lescila在英国諾福爾可结婚。他去世于1092年在英国諾福爾可古德斯東享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living at a place where rye (Old English ryge) was grown, or perhaps an occupational name for someone who grew or sold it.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads so named, most of them from Old Norse rjóthr ‘clearing in a forest’.

variants.name: Ryer
meanings: English (Sussex and Kent): probably from Rye (see Rea ) + the suffix -er, and is thus synonymous with Middle English atte Rye, denoting someone who lived by a river or an island. This type of formation is common in Sussex and Kent.
Americanized form of German   Reier   ‘heron’ or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.
Americanized form of Slovenian Rajar or Rajer (see Rayer ).

variants.name: Romney
meanings: English: habitational name from Romney (Kent), from an uncertain first element (perhaps an Old English personal name Rūmen) + Old English ēa ‘river, stream’. Compare Rye 2.

variants.name: Rea
meanings: English: from a misdivision of the Middle English phrase atter ye ‘at the island’ (Old English ēg, īeg). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on an island or patch of firm ground surrounded by marsh, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Rye (Sussex), The Rye in High Wycombe (Buckinghamshire), Rye Hill in Epping Upland (Essex), Rye Mill in Feering (Essex), and Rye House in Stanstead Abbots (Hertfordshire). Alternatively, the name may also arise from a misdivision of the Middle English phrase atter eye ‘at the river’ (Old English ēa) and may also be topographic, for someone who lived near a river or stream, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Rea in Hempsted (Gloucestershire), Ray Lodge in Lingfield (Surrey), and Rye Farm in Cranleigh (Surrey). Due to the similarity of Middle English forms it is now impossible to distinguish between the two explanations. See also Nye .

nameMeanings.name: Godric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Godric de Rye was born in 1040, in Little Hautbois, Norfolk, England, his father, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, was 36 and his mother, Albreda Preaux, was 33. He married Lescila about 1092, in Norfolk, England. He died in 1092, in Gooderstone, Norfolk, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godric de Rye est né en 1040, à Little Hautbois, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Albreda Preaux, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lescila environ 1092, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1092, à Gooderstone, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godric de Rye 1040 in Little Hautbois, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy 36 und seine Mutter Albreda Preaux 33. Er hat um 1092 in Norfolk, England Lescila geheiratet. Er starb 1092 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Gooderstone, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godric de Rye è nato il nel 1040 nel Little Hautbois, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Albreda Preaux, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Lescila circa 1092, nel Norfolk, England. Morì nel 1092, nel Gooderstone, Norfolk, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Ryes, Calvados, Duché de Normandie: フランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスリス
ja.Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルク
ja.Little Hautbois, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクリットル ハウトボイス
ja.Gooderstone, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクグダーストーン
ja.lifeSummary: Godric de Ryeが1040年にイギリスノーフォルクリットル ハウトボイスで生まれた時，父Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandyは36歳，母Albreda Preauxは33歳であった。約1092年にイギリスノーフォルクでLescilaと結婚した。彼は1092年にイギリスノーフォルクグダーストーンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godric de Rye(이)가 1040년 영국 노르폴크 리틀 하트보이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda Preaux(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1092년 영국 노르폴크에서 Lescila(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1092년 영국 노르폴크 구더스톤에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godric de Rye nasceu em 1040, em Little Hautbois, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Albreda Preaux, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lescila aproximadamente 1092, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1092, em Gooderstone, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godric de Rye родился в 1040 г. в местности литл хаутбоис, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda Preaux, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lescila около 1092 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. Он умер в 1092 г. в местности гудирстоун, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godric de Rye nació en 1040, en Little Hautbois, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Albreda Preaux, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lescila aproximadamente 1092, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Murió en 1092, en Gooderstone, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
